# Parkinson's Research Daily Report
**Date:** March 31, 2026
**Generated by:** Parkinson Research Agent

---

## 🔬 Clinical Trials

### ALN-SNCA First-in-Human Study (NCT07216066)
- **Phase:** Phase 1
- **Status:** Recruiting
- **Location:** Multiple sites
- **Eligibility:** Adults with early Parkinson's Disease
- **Intervention:** ALN-SNCA (alpha-synuclein targeted therapy)
- **Source:** https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT07216066

### Largest-Ever Parkinson's Disease Clinical Trial
- **Phase:** Large-scale recruitment
- **Status:** Recruiting (up to 1,600 participants)
- **Location:** Multiple trial sites (sites getting running through April 2026)
- **Sponsor:** Van Andel Institute
- **Source:** https://www.vai.org/article/largest-ever-parkinsons-disease-clinical-trial-opens/

### Bemdaneprocel Phase 3 Trial (exPDite-2)
- **NCT ID:** NCT06944522
- **Phase:** Phase 3
- **Status:** Recruiting
- **Intervention:** Stem cell-derived dopamine-producing neurons
- **Sponsor:** Bayer/Blue Rock Therapeutics
- **Source:** https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT06944522

### Tavapadon Fixed-Dose TEMPO Trials
- **Phase:** Phase 3 (TEMPO-1, TEMPO-2, TEMPO-3 completed; NDA submitted)
- **Status:** FDA review in progress
- **Intervention:** Once-daily partial D1/D5 dopamine receptor agonist
- **Source:** https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamaneurology/fullarticle/2846846

---

## 💊 Breakthrough Treatments

### Tavapadon — Next-Generation Dopamine Therapy
- **Type:** Symptomatic / Disease-modifying potential
- **Mechanism:** Partial agonist of D1 and D5 dopamine receptors (vs. traditional D2/D3 agonists)
- **Evidence:** TEMPO trials showed meaningful motor control improvements; ~1 extra hour of "On" time when added to levodopa; fewer side effects than existing agonists
- **Status:** NDA submitted to FDA September 2025; approval decision expected ~mid-2026
- **Source:** https://www.apdaparkinson.org/article/new-parkinsons-therapies-tavapadon-bemdaneprocel/

### Bemdaneprocel — Stem Cell Replacement Therapy
- **Type:** Disease-modifying / Regenerative
- **Mechanism:** Dopamine-producing neurons derived from stem cells, implanted into affected brain region
- **Evidence:** Phase 1/2 showed safety and potential benefit; imaging confirmed cell survival and integration
- **Status:** Phase 3 (exPDite-2) now recruiting globally
- **Source:** https://www.apdaparkinson.org/article/new-parkinsons-therapies-tavapadon-bemdaneprocel/

### N-acetyl-L-leucine (NALL) — Neuroprotective Compound
- **Type:** Disease-modifying
- **Mechanism:** Simultaneously targets multiple molecular pathways in dopaminergic neurons
- **Evidence:** FDA-approved compound showing neuroprotective effects in Parkinson's models
- **Source:** https://news.feinberg.northwestern.edu/2026/03/16/fda-approved-compound-promotes-neuroprotective-effects-in-parkinsons-disease/

### Onapgo (Apomorphine Hydrochloride Infusion)
- **Type:** Symptomatic
- **Mechanism:** Continuous subcutaneous infusion for advanced PD
- **Evidence:** FDA approved February 2025
- **Source:** https://med.stanford.edu/parkinsons/treating-living/emerging-treatments.html

### Organelle Therapy — Mitochondrial Capsules
- **Type:** Experimental / Disease-modifying
- **Mechanism:** Encapsulated mitochondria restore function; reduced neuronal loss in PD models
- **Evidence:** Preclinical (mouse models); improved motor performance
- **Source:** https://wms-site.com/press-media/1393-organelle-therapy-encapsulated-mitochondria-restore-function-in-parkinson-s-and-genetic-disorders-a-breakthrough

---

## 🏃 Lifestyle Interventions

### Updated Exercise Recommendations (Parkinson's Foundation + ACSM)
- **Category:** Exercise
- **Recommendation:** Evidence-based exercise protocols issued February 2026; emphasis on consistency over intensity
- **Evidence:** Established
- **Difficulty:** Varies
- **Source:** https://www.parkinson.org/about-us/news/updated-exercise-recommendations

### Mind-Body Exercise (MBE) Shows Greatest QoL Benefit
- **Category:** Exercise
- **Recommendation:** Mind-body exercise modalities demonstrate greatest benefit for quality of life in PD patients
- **Evidence:** PubMed (Feb 2026) — systematic review
- **Difficulty:** Moderate
- **Source:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41656425/

### Physiotherapy for Balance — Systematic Review (Nature, March 2026)
- **Category:** Exercise / Physiotherapy
- **Recommendation:** Evidence-based physiotherapy interventions for balance impairments
- **Evidence:** Systematic review and dose-response meta-analysis (March 2026)
- **Difficulty:** Moderate
- **Source:** https://www.nature.com/articles/s41531-026-01326-7

### PD Warrior Program
- **Category:** Exercise / Skill-based training
- **Recommendation:** Evidence-based Parkinson's-specific training programs
- **Evidence:** Established
- **Difficulty:** Moderate
- **Source:** https://pdwarrior.com/parkinsons-and-exercise-why-moving-more-in-2026-could-change-your-life/

### Aerobic Exercise Trial
- **Category:** Exercise / Aerobic
- **Recommendation:** Prior 6-month uncontrolled trial showed aerobic exercise improves motor function, cognition, and quality of life
- **Evidence:** Preliminary (University of Iowa trial)
- **Source:** https://clinicaltrials.uihealthcare.org/studies/aerobic-exercise-parkinsons-disease

## 🔬 Emerging Research

### Alpha-Synuclein Seed Amplification Assay Validation
- **Stage:** Biomarker validation
- **Institution:** Multiple (collaborative initiative)
- **Novelty:** Critical for PD diagnosis and tracking; enabling earlier detection
- **Source:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41854365/

### Tear Fluid Alpha-Synuclein Biomarker
- **Stage:** Diagnostic biomarker discovery
- **Institution:** Research published in npj Parkinson's Disease
- **Novelty:** Non-invasive biomarker using tear fluid for alpha-synuclein seeding activity
- **Source:** https://www.nature.com/articles/s41531-026-01282-2

### New Alpha-Synuclein PET Tracers — Human Testing
- **Stage:** Phase 1 / Translational
- **Conference:** ADPD2026
- **Novelty:** First PET radiotracer for imaging alpha-synuclein pathology in living brains
- **Source:** https://www.alzforum.org/news/conference-coverage/new-crop-synuclein-tracers-enter-human-testing

### 2026 Grand Challenges in Parkinson's Disease (Van Andel Institute)
- **Stage:** Conference / Symposium
- **Focus:** Early detection and staging of alpha-synuclein pathology; therapeutic opportunities
- **Source:** https://www.vai.org/event/2026-grand-challenges-in-parkinsons-disease/

### Michael J. Fox Foundation — Biomarker Advances
- **Stage:** Ongoing research initiative
- **Advance:** Spinal tap biomarker can detect abnormal alpha-synuclein; MJFF report details biochemical biomarker advances (March 2026)
- **Source:** https://www.michaeljfox.org/parkinsons-biomarkers

### UConn Novel Anti-Inflammatory Pill Trial
- **Stage:** Phase 2
- **Focus:** Testing novel pill targeting inflammation in early Parkinson's
- **Source:** https://today.uconn.edu/2026/02/a-pill-explores-new-frontier-in-early-parkinsons-disease-treatment/

---

## Quick Tips for Today

1. **Move** — Even 30 minutes of walking counts. Consistency > intensity. Mind-body exercises (MBE) show the greatest QoL benefit.
2. **Hydrate** — Dopaminergic medications work better with adequate hydration.
3. **Connect** — Social interaction reduces depression and cognitive decline risk.
4. **Track** — Use a symptom diary. Data helps your neurologist optimize treatment.
5. **Stay Informed** — Tavapadon FDA decision expected mid-2026; consider discussing with your neurologist if it may be appropriate.
